cards.back: A blockchain is a distributed digital ledger that records transactions across a network of computers in a secure and transparent manner.
Decentralization in blockchain refers to the distribution of power and control across a network of nodes, rather than relying on a central authority.
A consensus algorithm is a mechanism that allows nodes in a blockchain network to agree on the validity of new blocks and transactions, ensuring the integrity of the network.

cards.front: What is a full ecosystem in blockchain?
cards.back: A full ecosystem in blockchain refers to a system that includes not only the blockchain itself but also the underlying technology, infrastructure, and applications that support it.
A decentralized application (dApp) is a software application that runs on a blockchain network, allowing users to interact with the application in a secure and transparent manner.
